command:
cd ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo && python3 << 'PY'
import json
with open('website/data/feed.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
for r in d.get('reports', []):
    rid = r.get('id','?')
    rtype = r.get('type','?')
    auth = r.get('author','?')
    title = r.get('title','?')[:60]
    print(f'{rid}: {rtype} by {auth} -- {title}')
PY
